ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country this data belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the country */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the country */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 recoveries in the country */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New number of COVID-19 cases on the report date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* New number of COVID-19 deaths on the report date */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* New number of COVID-19 recoveries on the report date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., governmental, non-governmental, academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Total Cases, Total Deaths) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the data type (e.g., number, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "user_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-report association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the report (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_update_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
